subtitle.en: A privacy-friendly CAPTCHA alternative with no annoying puzzles
subtitle.zh: 保護隱私、沒有惱人拼圖的 CAPTCHA 替代方案

tagline.en: Proves your visitors are human — usually without making them click a single thing.
tagline.zh: 證明訪客是真人 —— 而且通常不用他們點任何東西。

text.en: Turnstile is Cloudflare's free replacement for CAPTCHA — those 'select all the traffic lights' tests. It checks visitors are real humans, usually without making them solve anything.
text.zh: Turnstile 是 Cloudflare 免費的 CAPTCHA 替代品。CAPTCHA 就是那種「選出所有紅綠燈」的測驗。Turnstile 用來確認訪客是真人，而且通常不用他們解任何題目。

text.en: Instead of puzzles, it runs tiny invisible JavaScript checks in the background to gather signals about the browser. From those signals it decides whether the visitor is trustworthy, only showing a simple checkbox when something looks risky.
text.zh: 它不用拼圖，而是在背景跑一些小小的隱形 JavaScript 檢查，收集瀏覽器的訊號。靠這些訊號判斷訪客可不可信，只有在情況可疑時才會跳出一個簡單的勾選框。

text.en: An automatic door that quietly senses a real person approaching and opens — versus the old turnstile where everyone had to stop and fumble with a token.
text.zh: 一扇會默默感應到真人走近就自動開啟的門 —— 對比舊式閘門，每個人都得停下來、笨拙地塞代幣才能過。

text.en: No frustrating image grids. Most users sail through without doing anything.
text.zh: 沒有令人抓狂的圖片九宮格。多數使用者什麼都不用做就過關了。

text.en: Doesn't track users across the web or harvest data to sell, unlike some ad-funded CAPTCHAs.
text.zh: 不像某些靠廣告賺錢的 CAPTCHA，它不會跨網站追蹤使用者，也不會蒐集資料拿去賣。

text.en: Blocks spam sign-ups, fake comments, and automated form abuse.
text.zh: 擋下灌爆的假註冊、垃圾留言，以及自動化的表單濫用。

text.en: WCAG 2.2 AA compliant, so it works for users with disabilities.
text.zh: 符合 WCAG 2.2 AA 無障礙標準，身障使用者也能順利使用。

text.en: Turnstile works in two parts: a widget on your page (client side) and a verification check on your server (server side). You always need both — never trust the client alone.
text.zh: Turnstile 分兩部分：頁面上的小工具（前端 client side）和伺服器上的驗證檢查（後端 server side）。兩邊都一定要做 —— 絕對不能只信前端。

text.en: In the Cloudflare dashboard go to Turnstile → Add widget. Enter your domain and pick a widget type. You'll get two keys: a Sitekey (public, for the page) and a Secret key (private, for your server).
text.zh: 在 Cloudflare 儀表板進入 Turnstile → Add widget。輸入你的網域並挑一種 widget 類型。你會拿到兩把金鑰：Sitekey（公開，放在頁面上）和 Secret key（私密，放在你的伺服器）。

title.en: Embed the widget in your page

text.en: Add the Turnstile script in the <head>, then drop a div with class cf-turnstile and your sitekey inside your form. It auto-creates a hidden field named cf-turnstile-response when solved.
text.zh: 在 <head> 加入 Turnstile 的 script，再把一個 class 為 cf-turnstile、帶上你 sitekey 的 div 放進表單裡。通過驗證後，它會自動產生一個名叫 cf-turnstile-response 的隱藏欄位。

title.en: Verify the token on your server

text.en: When the form is submitted, send the cf-turnstile-response token plus your Secret key to Cloudflare's Siteverify API. Only accept the form if the response says success: true.
text.zh: 表單送出後，把 cf-turnstile-response 這個權杖（token）連同你的 Secret key 一起送到 Cloudflare 的 Siteverify API。只有當回應的 success 為 true 時才接受這筆表單。

title.zh: 本機開發用的測試金鑰

text.en: Use sitekey 1x00000000000000000000AA (always passes) with secret 1x0000000000000000000000000000000AA while developing, so you don't trigger real challenges. Swap in your real keys before going live.
text.zh: 開發時用 sitekey 1x00000000000000000000AA（永遠通過）搭配 secret 1x0000000000000000000000000000000AA，就不會觸發真正的驗證。上線前記得換回你真正的金鑰。

text.en: Public key placed on your page. Safe to expose in HTML.
text.zh: 放在頁面上的公開金鑰，放進 HTML 沒問題。

text.en: Private key used only on your server to verify tokens. Keep it secret!
text.zh: 只在伺服器端用來驗證權杖的私密金鑰。一定要保密！

text.en: A one-time pass the widget issues after a visitor passes. Valid 300s, usable once.
text.zh: 訪客通過後 widget 發的一次性通行證。有效 300 秒，只能用一次。

text.en: The Cloudflare API your server calls to confirm a token is genuine.
text.zh: 你伺服器呼叫的 Cloudflare API，用來確認權杖是真的。

text.en: Default mode — decides on its own whether to show a checkbox based on risk.
text.zh: 預設模式 —— 依風險自行決定要不要跳出勾選框。

text.en: Runs completely in the background with no visible element at all.
text.zh: 完全在背景運作，畫面上看不到任何元件。

title.zh: 一定要在伺服器端驗證

text.en: A clever bot can fake the client widget. The Siteverify check on your server is the part that actually keeps you safe — never skip it.
text.zh: 聰明的機器人可以偽造前端 widget。真正保護你的是伺服器上的 Siteverify 檢查 —— 千萬別省略。

en: Turnstile is free with unlimited verifications, even on the Free plan.
It does not require your whole site to be proxied through Cloudflare — it works on any site.
Tokens expire after 300 seconds and can only be validated once, so verify promptly.
Pick widget size (normal, flexible, compact) and theme (auto/light/dark) with data- attributes.
zh: Turnstile 免費且驗證次數無上限，連 Free 方案也是。
不需要把整個網站都接過 Cloudflare 代理 —— 任何網站都能用。
權杖 300 秒後失效，且只能驗證一次，所以要儘快驗證。
用 data- 屬性挑 widget 尺寸（normal、flexible、compact）與主題（auto／light／dark）。
